## New / updated extension

- **Stack:**
- **Marker file(s):** (the exact filename devhub detects)

## Checklist

- [ ] `extensions/<id>.json` added/updated (id is kebab-case, matches filename)
- [ ] `registry.json` entry added/updated
- [ ] `node scripts/validate.mjs` passes
- [ ] `id` doesn't reuse a devhub built-in (node, docker, unity, php, python, go, rust)
- [ ] Commands are non-interactive and generally useful
